title: National Dosimetry Services account: Request additional services - Canada.ca
content:
## Your NDS account: Request additional services
- Apply for dosimetry services and order dosimeters
- Manage your billing statements
- Request additional services
Our Client Services Section can help you with:
- the need for additional dosimeters
- customized reporting to meet your specific requirements
- reprinting of reports such as exposure reports  and name lists
- priority processing request: accelerated analysis  of dosimeters
- semi-monthly monitoring service to safeguard  pregnant workers
- specialized consultation to help manage your  radiation monitoring program
- submitting dose modifications to the National Dose  Registry (regulatory approval may be required)
To request additional services, please call our Client Services Section at 1-800-261-6689 .
